appflow.flow.task.ConnectorOperator.Description: The operation to be performed on the provided source fields.

appflow.flow.task.DestinationField.Description: A field in a destination connector, or a field value against which Amazon AppFlow validates a source field.

appflow.flow.task.SourceFields.Description: The source fields to which a particular task is applied.

appflow.flow.task.TaskProperties.Description: A map used to store task-related information. The execution service looks for particular information based on the `TaskType`.

appflow.flow.task.TaskType.Description: Specifies the particular task implementation that Amazon AppFlow performs.
